Describe what is happening
canonical_answer: One man wears a white graphic t-shirt and dark sunglasses while holding a foil-wrapped food item to his mouth. Another man stands behind him wearing a formal black suit with a white shirt and black tie. A large mountain range rises in the background behind green trees. Text overlay reading 'COLLEGE STUDENT' appears in the upper corner of the frame.

question: Describe the visual progression of locations and activities shown in the video.
canonical_answer: At 0s, exterior signs for Missoula College and Student Union appear; at 2s, a brick building with 'MONTANA' inscription is shown; at 10s, a young male appears writing at a desk; at 12s, a red lamp illuminates the notebook; at 14s, the person continues writing with a silver pen.

question: Detail the specific actions and objects visible during the interior study scene.
canonical_answer: At 10s, a young male wearing a white t-shirt sits at a wooden desk; at 11s, he writes in a spiral notebook with blue highlights; at 12s, a red adjustable desk lamp casts light on the wall; at 14s, he holds a silver pen in his right hand; at 16s, a white wristband is visible on his left wrist.
